title: PtyClose
description: pty.close — terminate the shell behind pty_id. Daemon SIGTERMs the process group, waits 200 ms, then SIGKILLs survivors. Idempotent: closing an already-closed (or never-opened) pty_id returns success — keeps unmount cleanup simple.

PtyCloseResponse.title: PtyCloseResponse
PtyCloseResponse.description: Empty — the close is fire-and-forget on the server side; the ack just confirms the request was received.
